---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `devbox ...`
2. Observe ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15.2]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.13.1]
- devbox version: [e.g., 0.1.0]

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or log output (`--verbose`).
